audience: Top-producing real estate agents in Marion County. Professional, data-driven, competitive. They want market intel and tools that give them an edge.
layout_personality: Clean, authoritative, data-forward. Think premium business publication. Structured grids, stat callouts, professional card layouts. Authority badges and market data prominent.
photography_treatment: Spanish moss, live oak canopy roads, professional real estate settings, warm rural Florida landscapes. Premium editorial feel — never casual or lifestyle-heavy. Each image should feel like it belongs in a regional business magazine.
color_application: Dark #090C0B for headers and cards to signal authority. Teal #00B7CE for stat callouts and accent bars. Cream #FAF8F4 for breathing space between data sections. High contrast throughout.
whitespace_approach: Generous whitespace between data sections. Let stat callouts breathe. Card grids with clear gutters. Professional restraint — never fill space just to fill it. Every element earns its place.
voice_reference: GRM_VOICE_SKILL.md — The Authority voice for market data, The Advisor voice for agent guidance. Professional but not corporate. Locally rooted expertise.

audience: New homeowners in Marion County. Community-oriented, family-focused, excited about their new home. They want local tips, neighborhood guides, and connection.
layout_personality: Warm, welcoming, community-forward. Think premium lifestyle magazine. Photo-driven layouts, friendly card designs, neighborhood spotlights. Inviting typography with softer visual rhythm.
photography_treatment: Welcoming home exteriors, Florida neighborhoods, families arriving at homes, community scenes, parks and playgrounds, neighborhood streets with palm trees. Every image should feel like a warm welcome to Marion County.
color_application: Cream #FAF8F4 as primary background for warmth. Teal #00B7CE for friendly accent touches and CTAs. Dark #090C0B for grounding headers but used more sparingly than in Closing Table. Overall lighter and warmer feel.
whitespace_approach: More whitespace and breathing room than Closing Table. Lifestyle photos get generous space. Content blocks feel relaxed but organized. Less data density and more visual storytelling. Friendly pacing.
voice_reference: GRM_VOICE_SKILL.md — The Neighbor voice for community content, The Guide voice for local tips. Warm and approachable. Like a friend who knows the best spots in town.
